title: Increase the Chance of winning by playing Slot Machine Games
content:
Slot machines, known variously by the names slot machine, fruit machine, slots or roulette, poker machine or the fruit machines pugs are an electronic gaming machine that creates a game of luck for its users. Random number generators form the basis of the mechanism that powers slot machines. The generator is typically a computer with a digital interface that can generate random numbers. It generates random numbers, which can be translated into symbols that can be identified in the reels. In the majority of slot machine games, symbols which are visible to the players are referred to as "strokes" or "calls." Certain symbols are inaccessible to players, and are called "nonstrokes."

The generator for random numbers is an integrated circuit referred to as a Random Access System, or RAS. Most of these random number generating thunderstruck ii slot equipment have built-in memory, also known as a ROM. The main purpose of the ROM is to keep track of and process the data that is generated by the machines. The symbols on the reels must be seen by the player whenever he places his wager on the machine.

The majority of slot machines today are connected through cables to a central core to which the various reels are linked. These cables connect the slots to one another.
